name: ed_triage
description: an ED triage world: patients arrive with an acuity level and wait; actions triage, assign_bed, discharge; sicker patients are seen first

card.description: an ED triage world: patients arrive with an acuity level and wait; actions triage, assign_bed, discharge; sicker patients are seen first

rules: Acuity is 1..5 where 1 is the most acute (sickest) and 5 the least.
Each patient advances waiting -> triaged -> in_bed -> discharged.
Every action advances the clock by 1 and ages the wait of every patient still waiting or triaged.
'triage' moves the sickest waiting patient to triaged.
'assign_bed' moves the sickest triaged patient into a bed, only if a bed is free (beds_occupied < beds_total).
'discharge' discharges the sickest in-bed patient, freeing a bed and incrementing discharged.
Sicker patients are always selected first; ties break by longest wait, then lowest id.
A perceived arrival (pending_acuity in 1..5) is admitted as a new waiting patient on the next step.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    patients = [dict(p) for p in s.get("patients", [])]
    name = action.get("name")
    beds_total = s.get("beds_total", 0)

    # --- common prelude: advance the clock and age everyone still waiting ---
    s["clock"] = s.get("clock", 0) + 1
    for p in patients:
        if p.get("status") in ("waiting", "triaged"):
            p["wait"] = p.get("wait", 0) + 1

    # --- admit an arrival staged by perception (pending_acuity in 1..5) ---
    pending = s.get("pending_acuity", 0)
    if isinstance(pending, int) and 1 <= pending <= 5:
        new_id = s.get("next_id", 1)
        patients.append({"id": new_id, "acuity": pending,
                         "status": "waiting", "wait": 0})
        s["next_id"] = new_id + 1
        s["pending_acuity"] = 0

    def sickest(status):
        # lowest acuity first (sickest), then longest wait, then lowest id
        elig = [p for p in patients if p.get("status") == status]
        if not elig:
            return None
        return sorted(elig, key=lambda p: (p.get("acuity", 5),
                                           -p.get("wait", 0),
                                           p.get("id", 0)))[0]

    occupied = sum(1 for p in patients if p.get("status") == "in_bed")

    if name == "triage":
        p = sickest("waiting")
        if p is not None:
            p["status"] = "triaged"
    elif name == "assign_bed":
        if occupied < beds_total:
            p = sickest("triaged")
            if p is not None:
                p["status"] = "in_bed"
    elif name == "discharge":
        p = sickest("in_bed")
        if p is not None:
            p["status"] = "discharged"
            s["discharged"] = s.get("discharged", 0) + 1

    # --- derived counts kept on the state for reporting / previews ---
    s["patients"] = patients
    s["waiting"] = sum(1 for p in patients if p.get("status") == "waiting")
    s["triaged"] = sum(1 for p in patients if p.get("status") == "triaged")
    s["beds_occupied"] = sum(1 for p in patients if p.get("status") == "in_bed")
    return s

emit.report: t={clock}: {waiting} waiting, {triaged} triaged, {beds_occupied}/{beds_total} beds in use, {discharged} discharged
